targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Tautulli")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "total_bandwidth")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["type"] == "current_stream_stats")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Tautulli")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "lan_bandwidth")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["type"] == "current_stream_stats")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Tautulli")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "wan_bandwidth")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["type"] == "current_stream_stats")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Ombi")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["type"] == "Request_Counts")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "pending")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["type"] == "Request_Counts")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "approved")

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["type"] == "Request_Counts")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Tautulli")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["type"] == "library_stats")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["section_name"] == "Movies")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "total")
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])
  |> distinct(column: "_value")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Tautulli")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["type"] == "library_stats")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["section_name"] == "Movies")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "total")

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["type"] == "library_stats")

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["type"] == "library_stats")

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "stream_count")

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "transcode_streams")

  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "direct_play_streams")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["type"] == "current_stream_stats")

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "direct_streams")

  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["type"] == "Issues_Counts")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "pending")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Ombi")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["type"] == "Issues_Counts")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "resolved")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Ombi")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["type"] == "Issues_Counts")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "in_progress")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Tautulli")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["type"] == "library_stats")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["section_name"] == "TV Shows")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "total")
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])
  |> distinct(column: "_value")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Tautulli")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["type"] == "library_stats")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["section_name"] == "4k Movies")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "total")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Tautulli")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["type"] == "library_stats")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["section_name"] == "4k TV")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "total")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Tautulli")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["type"] == "library_stats")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["section_name"] == "4k TV")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "seasons")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Tautulli")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["type"] == "library_stats")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["section_name"] == "4k TV")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "episodes")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
      r._measurement == "Tautulli" and
      r._field == "hash" and
      r.type == "Session" and
      r.media_type != "Track"
  )
  |> keep(columns: ["_value", "device_type"])
  |> group(columns: ["device_type"])
  |> distinct(column: "_value")
  |> count()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Tautulli")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "hash")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["type"] == "Session")
  
  |> keep(columns: ["_value", "video_decision"])
  |> group(columns: ["video_decision"])
  |> distinct(column: "_value")
  |> count()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Radarr")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["type"] == "Queue")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "hash")

  |> keep(columns: [
    "_start",
    "name",
    "_value",
    "quality"
    ])
  |> distinct(column: "_value")
  |> group()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Tautulli")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "hash")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["type"] == "Session")
  |> keep(columns: [
      "_value",
      "latitude",
      "longitude",
      "full_location",
      "location",
      "name"
  ])
  |> group(columns: [
      "latitude",
      "longitude",
      "full_location",
      "location",
      "name"
  ])
  |> distinct(column: "_value")
  |> count()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "metric"})
  |> group()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Sonarr")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["type"] == "Queue")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "hash")

  |> keep(columns: [
    "_start",
    "name",
    "_value",
    "quality"
    ])
  |> distinct(column: "_value")
  |> group()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Tautulli")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "hash")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["type"] == "Session")
  |> keep(columns: [
      "_value",
      "friendly_name",
      "title",
      "quality",
      "video_decision",
      "quality_profile",
      "platform",
      "location",
      "player_state"
  ])
  |> group(columns: [
      "friendly_name",
      "title",
      "quality",
      "video_decision",
      "quality_profile",
      "platform",
      "product_version",
      "location",
      "player_state"
  ])
  |> distinct(column: "_value")
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "hash"})
  |> group()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Sonarr")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "hash")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["type"] == "Future")
  |> keep(columns: [
      "_value",
      "name",
      "airsUTC",
      "downloaded"
      "sxe"
  ])
  |> group(columns: [
      "name",
      "airsUTC",
      "sxe",
      "downloaded"
  ])
  |> distinct(column: "_value")
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "hash"})
  |> group()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "Tautulli")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "hash")
  |> group()
  |> window(every: 1m)
  |> distinct(column: "_value")
  |> count()

  |> duplicate(column: "_stop", as: "_time")
  |> window(every: inf)
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "sessions"})

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Sonarr")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "hash")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["type"] == "Missing")
  |> keep(columns: [
      "_value",
      "name",
      "airsUTC",
      "downloaded"
      "sxe"
  ])
  |> group(columns: [
      "name",
      "airsUTC",
      "sxe",
      "downloaded"
  ])
  |> distinct(column: "_value")
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "hash"})
  |> group()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Ombi")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["type"] == "Requests")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "hash")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["status"] == "1" or r["status"] == "3")
  |> keep(columns: [
	  "title",
	  "requested_date",
	  "requested_user",
	  "request_type",
	  "status"
	])
  |> distinct(column: "hash")
  |> group(columns: ["hash"])
